author: y4rr
content: fftn/ifftn on CUDA currently dispatches to cufftPlan3d (rank-3, shape [d,h,w,2]) and cufftPlanMany rank=2 (shape [h,w,2]) when s=None and axes=None. Cases with explicit axes or non-None s still fall through to tensor_to_complex_array which returns NotImplementedOnCuda. Affected fixture tags: ndim_3_axes_neg1, ndim_3_axes_0, ndim_3_axes_n2_n1, ndim_2_with_s. Fix requires axes-aware cufftPlanMany dispatch with correct stride/embed/idist/odist parameters. 16 fixture cases cascade-skipped in conformance_fft.rs with ref to this issue.
